label: Editable register
description: A record set you can complete and update in place — add / edit / delete rows and Save. Rows come from a settings collection or a generic mapping slot; the server owns the write.

params.label: Rows
params.description: Rows come from the bound source (a settings collection or a mapping slot), not authored inline.

params.label: Settings collection
params.description: Settings field key to read/write (settings-collection source).

params.label: Endpoint
params.description: PUT target for the settings-collection source.

params.label: Slot
params.description: Mapping slot to read/write via the generic surface (slot source); mutually exclusive with collection.

params.label: Edit role
params.description: Minimum role allowed to edit; anyone below sees it read-only.
